name: Sarazener (Saracen)
recipeIngredient: 600 g Liver from European elk or deer, cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
Salt and pepper to taste.
Prepare spaetzle according to package instructions.
1. Heat the fat in a large skillet over medium heat. Add the onions and cook until golden brown, stirring occasionally.
2. Reduce the heat to low and add the liver pieces, sautéing until lightly browned on all sides.
3. Stir in the flour, then gradually add some of the broth, stirring constantly to prevent lumps.
4. Continue adding broth until the mixture reaches a simmer.
5. Add the remaining broth and spaetzle to the skillet, gently stirring to combine.
6. Cook for a few more minutes over low heat, allowing the sauce to thicken slightly.
7. Taste and adjust seasoning with vinegar if desired.
8. Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
Serves 4.
